Scope: External supplier invoices captured at line-item level (Jan 2026 – Jun 2026) · Includes: parts, materials, freight, software, consumables & professional services invoiced to DHR Engineering · Excludes: advance payments (tracked separately as prepayments), payroll & social security, taxes & compliance fees, BG VAT refunds, land & capex purchases, and inter-company transfers · All amounts in EUR (converted at invoice-date FX rates) · Invoice totals are deduplicated across line items

A · Multi-Vendor Item Types Consolidation candidates

Item types supplied by 3 or more vendors — candidates for standardising on one preferred supplier to unlock volume discounts and reduce admin overhead.

Fragmented Ordering Batching opportunity

Vendors with ≥4 invoices and avg order below €500. Monthly purchase orders could open volume pricing conversations.
